---
name: Hardware Request
about: Request support for new hardware or device
title: '[HARDWARE] '
labels: hardware
assignees: ''

---

## Hardware Information

**What hardware would you like ClawOS to support?**

Provide the name and model of the device (e.g., "Raspberry Pi 5", "BeagleBoard-X15", "Orange Pi Zero 3").

## Specifications

**Please provide hardware specifications:**

- **CPU:** (e.g., ARM Cortex-A76, x86-64)
- **RAM:** (e.g., 4 GB)
- **Storage:** (e.g., microSD, eMMC)
- **Network:** (e.g., WiFi 6, Gigabit Ethernet)
- **GPIO/Peripherals:** (e.g., 40-pin header, CSI camera, I2S audio)
- **Price:** (approximate cost in USD)

## Why This Hardware?

**What makes this hardware a good fit for ClawOS?**

Explain why this hardware is worth supporting (e.g., low cost, low power, popular, unique features).

## Use Case

**How would you use ClawOS on this hardware?**

Describe your intended use case (e.g., companion agent, wearable, sensor node, edge AI).

## Links

**Relevant links:**

- Product page: 
- Datasheet: 
- Community: 

## Tier Preference

**Which support tier do you think this hardware should be?**

- [ ] Tier 1 (primary target, official support)
- [ ] Tier 2 (supported, tested)
- [ ] Tier 3 (community-maintained)

## I can help with support

- [ ] Yes, I have this hardware and can test ClawOS on it
- [ ] Yes, I can help with drivers or kernel configuration
- [ ] Yes, I can write documentation for this hardware
- [ ] No, just requesting support

## Additional Context

**Anything else we should know?**

Add any other context, photos, or examples about the hardware.
